disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Difficulty swallowing that has progressed over about 5 months from dry solids, to soft food, to liquids
trigger_question_examples: How long has swallowing been a problem?
Did it start with solids or liquids?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started around 5 months ago with dry things like toast, then soft food, and over time it got worse until even liquids wouldn't go down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete inability to swallow anything, including own saliva, for the past 12 hours, with immediate regurgitation of foul-smelling fluid
trigger_question_examples: Can you swallow your own saliva right now?
What happens when you try to drink?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — nothing goes down at all now, not even my spit. Everything comes straight back up smelling awful, so I just keep spitting into a bowl.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Significant unintentional weight loss of about 15 kg over recent months
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight without trying?
How have you been eating over the last few months?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've dropped about 15 kilos without trying — my clothes are all loose now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent hoarseness of the voice and a persistent cough
trigger_question_examples: Have you had a new or ongoing cough?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My voice has gone hoarse over the last little while and I keep coughing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Painful swallowing and a constant pressure behind the breastbone that is not related to meals
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any chest pain or pressure?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Swallowing really hurts, and there's a constant heavy pressure behind my breastbone that doesn't come and go with eating.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long history of severe acid reflux on daily high-dose reflux medication, and a long history of heavy smoking
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any long-standing health conditions?
Do you smoke, and are you on any regular medicines?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had bad reflux for years and take a high-dose reflux tablet every day, though it's doing nothing now. I've been a heavy smoker for a long time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feeling drained, exhausted and weak, unable to take in any food or fluids
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself?
When did you last manage to eat or drink anything?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel completely drained and weak — I haven't been able to get any food or water down.
